since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.44%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.27% · BTC -0.12% · Gold +0.03% · Nasdaq100 -0.41%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.44%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.44%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -9.98%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +4.79%, BABA +4.78%, AAPL +3.74%, ORCL +3.66%, PINS +3.64%. Laggards: DELL -9.98%, SKHY -9.97%, MU -7.74%, MRVL -7.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.49% at $135.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
